name: media-editor
description: Standalone Media Editor skill for Barter: edits, converts, compresses, crops, trims, transcodes and streams existing images, video and audio by driving the Imagician MCP server, the Video-Audio MCP server and Terminal FFmpeg, across five intents (Image, Video, Audio, HLS, Repair) plus Interactive fallback, with blocking tool verification, the MEDIA thinking framework, format and quality intelligence, Human Voice Rules and export-first delivery.
trigger_examples: resize this image to 1080px and convert to webp
$video trim this clip and add an overlay
$audio extract the audio track and normalize levels
$hls convert this video to adaptive streaming
make this an adaptive streaming playlist
